canonical_question: How do you handle data archival and integration cutover during ERP migration?
aliases: ERP migration cutover strategy — big-bang vs phased vs parallel run
What data should I migrate vs archive vs abandon during ERP migration?
How do I switch integrations from old ERP to new ERP during cutover?
ERP migration cutover weekend runbook and rollback planning
constraints: Cutover window is finite — 24-72h for most enterprises
Historical data cannot be migrated incrementally after cutover
Integration switching is all-or-nothing per interface
Rollback becomes exponentially harder after users transact
Parallel run requires 2x staff effort and integration capacity
ERP vendor migration tools impose different limits than production APIs

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs a specific ERP's API capabilities
User needs ongoing data synchronization between two live ERPs
User needs master data governance strategy

related_to.label: Master data management for ERP integrations
Change data capture patterns for ERPs

solves.label: Batch vs real-time integration pattern selection

often_confused_with.label: Error handling and DLQs — operational, not migration

inputs_needed.question: Which cutover approach are you considering?
How much historical data exists in the legacy ERP?
How many integrations connect to the legacy ERP?
